message:
🌱 Add node-exporter: Support new pressure interface mission (#1749)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "node-exporter-1174-support-new-pressure-interface",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "node-exporter: Support new pressure interface",
+    "description": "Support new pressure interface. Requested by 10+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current node-exporter deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your node-exporter version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n node-exporter -l app.kubernetes.io/name=node-exporter\nhelm list -n node-exporter 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working node-exporter installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review node-exporter configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant node-exporter configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n node-exporter -l app.kubernetes.io/name=node-exporter\nkubectl get configmap -n node-exporter -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=node-exporter\n```\nKernel 4.20 will include the [facebook psi pressure metrics](https://facebookmicrosites.github.io/psi/docs/overview) ([commit](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=eb414681d5a07d28d2ff90dc05f69ec6b232ebd2))."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support new pressure interface",
+        "description": "This enables the collection of pressure stall information as exposed by the `/proc/pressure` interface added in the 4.20 release of the Linux kernel.\n```yaml\n/proc/pressure/cpu:1:some avg10=0.00 avg60=0.00 avg300=0.00 total=1167162866\n/proc/pressure/io:1:some avg10=0.00 avg60=0.00 avg300=0.00 total=61955081\n/proc/pressure/io:2:full avg10=0.00 avg60=0.00 avg300=0.00 total=58578187\n/proc/pressure/memory:1:some avg10=0.00 avg60=0.00 avg300=0.00 total=0\n/proc/pressure/memory:2:full avg10=0.00 avg60=0.00 avg300=0.00 total=0\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n node-exporter -l app.kubernetes.io/name=node-exporter\nkubectl get events -n node-exporter --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support new pressure interface\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This enables the collection of pressure stall information as exposed by the `/proc/pressure` interface added in the 4.20 release of the Linux kernel.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "/proc/pressure/cpu:1:some avg10=0.00 avg60=0.00 avg300=0.00 total=1167162866\n/proc/pressure/io:1:some avg10=0.00 avg60=0.00 avg300=0.00 total=61955081\n/proc/pressure/io:2:full avg10=0.00 avg60=0.00 avg300=0.00 total=58578187\n/proc/pressure/memory:1:some avg10=0.00 avg60=0.00 avg300=0.00 total=0\n/proc/pressure/memory:2:full avg10=0.00 avg60=0.00 avg300=0.00 total=0",
+        "node_psi_avg10{resource=\"memory\",time=\"full\"} 10",
+        "node_psi_memory_avg10{time=\"full\"} 10"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "node-exporter",
+      "graduated",
+      "observability",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "node-exporter"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/prometheus/node_exporter/issues/1174",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/prometheus/node_exporter",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/prometheus/node_exporter/pull/1261"
+    },
+    "reactions": 10,
+    "comments": 7,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with node-exporter installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-25T06:30:34.308Z",
